svg.title: Footsteps architecture as of Phase 3 completion
svg.desc: Structural diagram showing the current Footsteps system. Visitor browser requests reach the Cloudflare edge, served by an Astro Worker that queries D1 for data and proxies image bytes from R2. A separate deploy pipeline pushes code from the laptop via GitHub to the Worker.
svg.text: DB → D1, PHOTOS → R2, ASSETS → static, SESSION → KV
Deploy pipeline — how code reaches production
